headline: Aristocrat delivers the best value-for-money
detail: Sentiment score of 68.1 at an avg price of ₹1,699 — the best sentiment-per-rupee ratio across all brands.

headline: Skybags relies heavily on discounting
detail: Avg discount of 51% but only 4.0★ rating — heavy discounting may signal product perception issues rather than demand generation.

headline: American Tourister has a rating–sentiment gap
detail: Star rating implies 4.5★ satisfaction but review sentiment score is only 68.1/100. Customers may rate generously but write critically.

headline: Safari dominates review volume
detail: 61,536 total ratings — 65% of all reviews in the dataset. High market penetration but check if sentiment holds.
